title: malvaviscus populneus
intro: Malvaviscus populneus, also known as the "Mexican hibiscus," is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Malvaviscus populneus include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Malvaviscus populneus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal supplements and capsules.
